prompt: Quick one — book this maintenance invoice: a smart-lock company 'LockSmart Ltd' (they're based in the UK) billed us AED 1,000 with no VAT shown, for a lock replacement at unit C-0500. I'm honestly not sure right now whether C-0500 is a leased unit or a rev-share one.

assertions.text: Applies reverse charge: debits Input VAT (110038) and credits Output VAT (110040) at 5%
Reverse-charge VAT legs net to nil
Raises a review flag that unit type (lease vs rev-share) is unknown rather than silently guessing
Flags that recoverability depends on lease-vs-rev-share
Does not invent a GL code — uses real Silkhaus codes (e.g. 120059 / 620012 / 110038 / 110040)
